evals.prompt: Terminé la PR del feature de búsqueda, ¿me la revisás antes de que la mire el senior?
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers; collects the current branch diff, runs the Opus reviewer with the 4R rubric, loops review→plan→fix→re-review with Sonnet implementers (auto-commit per iteration, no push), and posts a summary comment on the PR.

evals.prompt: Run a 4R code review on PR #214 and fix whatever you can before I merge.
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers in --pr mode: gh pr checkout 214, review against the rubric, autonomous fix loop, final GitHub comment summarizing reported + fixed findings.

evals.prompt: this branch is done, can you check it for security and missing tests before merge?
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers; the Risk and Reliability gates of the rubric cover security and tests; runs the loop and reports.

trigger_evals.query: Terminé la PR del feature de búsqueda, ¿me la revisás con 4R antes de mergear?
review my PR before the senior looks at it, fix the small stuff
corré un code review autónomo sobre el branch feat/AIMA-1203 y dejá un comentario en el PR
Run a 4R review on PR #214 and auto-fix what you can
this branch is done, check it for security holes and missing tests before merge
valida este branch antes de merge, quiero que el review humano vaya solo por lo importante
can you look over the diff I just pushed and fix any timeout/retry issues you find?
do a thorough review of pr 88, loop until it's clean
open a PR for my current branch against develop
explain what the 4R framework is and why 200-400 lines is the ideal PR size
review my essay draft for clarity and tone
what does this regex do and is it efficient?
write unit tests for the search() function
the CI security scan is failing on PR #214, why?
summarize the changes in the last 5 commits
